q1: The MSADS curriculum includes core data science, machine learning, analytics, and applied project courses.
q2: The MSADS program provides support related to internships and CPT for eligible students.
q3: Applicants must submit transcripts, resume, statement of purpose, and other required materials.
q4: Yes, the MSADS program offers an online program format.
q5: Graduates pursue careers in data science, machine learning, analytics, and related fields.
